label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. The question is whether following the given instructions will bring me back to the starting point. The instructions are: "Always face forward. Take 8 steps right. Take 8 steps left." The options are Yes or No. First, I need to understand what "always face forward" means in this context. Facing forward usually means facing the same direction you were initially. So if I start facing a certain direction, I don't change that direction during the steps. Now, the next step is taking 8 steps to the right. If I'm facing forward, moving right would be to the right relative to my current facing direction. So if I'm facing north, moving right would be east. Then, taking 8 steps left would be moving west, which is the opposite of east. So if
